patch.value: Consolidate item annotation facets: comments/notes/learnings/files/docs/deps/append/test become one facet grammar (old spellings aliased)

Eight top-level commands (comments, notes, learnings, files, docs, deps, append, test) are all per-item annotation/link facets with near-identical shape (<id> plus --add/--remove/list). The pm-n7rr target surface names 'item facets' as ONE noun group of the ~15; this task implements it per the grammar ADR pm-pbyu — one shared facet implementation, each facet a verb of a single noun (exact spelling fixed at ADR acceptance), current spellings kept as hidden aliases via the pm-0z7n shim with one-line migration hints. Zero feature loss. Duplicate check: pm-9y8q (closed, internal dedup of the comments/notes/learnings stacks) and pm-zwpp (SDK promotion of the same primitives — complementary: that item is API layering, this one is CLI grammar only); no open overlap.

One facet grammar covers all 8 annotation surfaces with identical flags and payloads; every old spelling dispatches through the alias shim with a migration hint; spelling-parity spec proves identical output old vs new; contracts, completions (bash/zsh/fish), docs, and MCP names regenerate from the contract table; top-level help lists item facets under a single noun entry.
